overview: Smart Tourism Kanyakumari is a comprehensive web portal for exploring and booking tourism experiences in Kanyakumari, India. It features tourist place discovery, hotel bookings with payment, local guide profiles, restaurant listings, and an admin panel — all powered by the Internet Computer blockchain.
features: Tourist places directory with hidden gems, water wonders, unique places, and nearby attractions
Hotel booking with Stripe payment integration (test mode)
Username/password login with secure session tokens
Google Maps integration — View on Map button and iframe embed for each place
Local guide profiles with direct call feature
Admin panel with full data management
Modern icon styling throughout the app
